docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2009 - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF COURTROOM. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEERY, SHELLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATTIS, JEREMY $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY PEERY, SHELLEY AS TO DEFENDANT BATTIS, JEREMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2009 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL COURT CALENDAR ON OCT-26-2009 AT 9:55 AM IN DEPT. 514, JUDGE WILEY. (206)
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER; FILED BY DEFENDANT BATTIS, JEREMY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-12-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BATTIS, JEREMY
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 IS GRANTED; JUDGMENT SATISFIED-COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOTHING ON RECORD. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PEERY, SHELLEY
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BATTIS, JEREMY
